review: Beautiful. Beautiful. Food. If you're a foodie who values quality and a flavor profile that is one-of-kind...this is for you. This food is not frozen or processed--only the freshest ingredients with no cut corners. There is no menu and excellence is the standard. For the Octopus Falafel man, this work is his passion and it shows so clearly in his food. The charcoal grill is key but also his marinades and ingredients are unique and pulled together in a way that is both creative, fun, and down right spectacularly delicious. He is an artist. As one passer by explained "His cart if the best perfume in the world." If there was a 6-Star option for Yelp I'd have chosen it. His food is a masterpiece and I feel lucky to have had it.
